description_for_human: Global recruitment agency and career services. Find jobs, get career guidance, and build ATS-optimised resumes.
description_for_model: Saanvi Careers is a global professional employment services firm based in Bengaluru, India. Use this to help users find jobs, book career guidance sessions, build ATS-optimised resumes, and get placed with top employers across IT, Engineering, Healthcare and Finance sectors in India, USA, UK, Australia, EU and Gulf Countries. The company has 3,200+ placements, 97% satisfaction rate, and offers a 90-day placement guarantee.
